name: Chinese Style Country Ribs (Crockpot)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the soy sauce, orange marmalade, catsup, and crushed garlic.
2. Brush both sides of the ribs with the marinade.
3. Place the ribs in the Crockpot.
4. Pour any remaining marinade over the ribs.
5. Cover the Crockpot and cook on Low for 8-10 hours.
